edges.note: DistributionalCoupling extends CouplingScorer with kurtosis sensitivity.
CouplingScorer is susceptible to Megethos unless normalized.
Same Megethos issue for distributional scorer.
Categorical object-keyed scorer breaks where distributional scorer fails, and vice versa.
First-gap analysis often does the job without full unfolding.
Prime decontamination must run before any numerical coupling on scalar features.
Conductor and rank stratifications can be applied jointly.
F1 label shuffle catches less than F39 feature permutation for representation artifacts.
ADE-type via Galois label is a coarse proxy for the actual object-keyed Galois scorer.
P104 description quote: 'Stricter than P040 when test axis correlates with confound.' P104 block-shuffle is P040 restricted to within-stratum shuffles; strictly a specialization.
P035 description quote: 'Finer than P026 semistable vs additive.' Kodaira symbols further split the semistable/additive binary into Tate’s full classification.
P035 description quote: 'Tautology-adjacent to P021 (Kodaira type constrains bad-prime Tamagawa contribution).'

P036 description quote: 'Equivalent to (−1)^rank under BSD parity; so on EC families this aliases P023 rank parity and P028 Katz-Sarnak SO_even/SO_odd. Independent projection only for non-EC L-function families.'
P036 description quote: 'Equivalent to (−1)^rank under BSD parity; so on EC families this aliases P023 rank parity and P028 Katz-Sarnak SO_even/SO_odd.'
P037 description quote: 'For EC: non-CM gives SU(2); CM gives N(U(1)). Tautology with P025 CM flag on EC.' Sato-Tate group on EC is determined exactly by CM status.
P039 description quote: 'Partial tautology with P100 isogeny class size (class_size ≥ 2 ⇔ nonmax_primes ≠ []).'
P100 description quote: 'Partial tautologies vs isogeny_degrees (class_size = len of), P024 torsion, and P039 Galois ℓ-adic image (class_size≥2 ⇔ nonmax_primes≠[]).' Reverse link for navigation.
P100 description quote: 'Partial tautologies vs isogeny_degrees (class_size = len of), P024 torsion, and P039 Galois ℓ-adic image.' Mazur-bounded class sizes overlap with Mazur torsion structure.

P031 description quote: 'Forbidden-cell partial tautology: ν=−1 only at even dimension.' Frobenius-Schur indicator values are constrained by the Artin rep dimension stratification P102; certain (Dim, ν) cells are empty by representation theory.
P033 description quote: 'Tautology with P028 on rank-parity for EC families.' Artin Is_Even parity collapses to Katz-Sarnak SO_even/SO_odd on EC families via BSD parity.

P102 description quote: 'Dim × Is_Even (non-uniform — dim-2 odd-dominated, dim-4 even-dominated).' P033 parity distributes non-uniformly across P102 Artin dimensions — not a tautology but a strong joint dependency.
P032 description quote: 'Tautology vs P028 when families align with parity.' MF / Dirichlet character parity collapses to Katz-Sarnak family classification under the aligned-parity condition.
P012 description quote: 'Alternative to Lhash — hashes Hecke eigenvalues. More strict. Useful when Lhash is too coarse.'
P101 description quote: 'Useful only at rank ≥ 1 as a separating axis; rank-0 regulator is degenerate.' P101 regulator stratification is meaningful only within P023 rank ≥ 1 slices.
